response.step_by_step_log: For 'Genesis', I identified the song from the on-screen text and performer (Hololive English-Advent-). I used the search query "Genesis hololive English-Advent- Japanese and English lyrics". For 'id:entity voices', I identified the song from the on-screen text and performer (Hololive Indonesia). I used the search query "id:entity voices hololive Indonesia Japanese and English lyrics". Both searches provided the necessary lyrics in Japanese and English.
response.global_summary: The video features two musical performances by Hololive VTubers, each preceded by brief transitions. The first scene is a performance of "Genesis" by Hololive English-Advent-. The second scene is a performance of "id:entity voices" by members of Hololive Indonesia.

scenes.description: Hololive English-Advent- VTubers perform the song 'Genesis' on a stage with '2025>2026' graphics.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
Time to open up your eyes,
Feel the music start to rise,
Got to break the world and let me in.
I know I was meant to be,
Livin' life so fast and free,
Try to keep your eyes on me,
'Cause this is where my story all begins.
Livin' it up like crazy,
Ready to play?
Come on, you know what time it is!
IT'S OUR GENESIS!
Whispers banging down your window,
Rumors reaching a crescendo,
No humble beginnings,
A death-defying, world-shaking,
Come on, you know what time it is!
IT'S OUR GENESIS!

scenes.description: Hololive Indonesia members perform the song 'id:entity voices' on a futuristic stage.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
君に届けたい
Id:entity
ステージに一歩を踏み出した
(おはよう こんばんは)
と世界に叫んでみよう
本日のライブでは
どれの自分を見せるの？
前からそう悩んで
好きな自分になれない
そしてある日誰かに
言われた
偉大な言葉なんてに
迷っていた
いつも
とびきりの笑顔を
失わないように
これ以上は期待を
裏切らないと決めた
溢れている
雑音の中
この声響けるか？
心に宿る
声を聞いてみよう
これはずっと見せたい
自分だった
集まった声たちが
ひとつになる
id:entity voices.
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
I want to deliver this to you,
Id:entity,
Taking the first step,
Onto the stage,
(Good morning! Good evening!)
Let's shout out to the world,
In today's live,
Which 'me' will I show?
I've been worried about this for a long time,
I can't become the 'me' I want to be,
And then, one day, someone told me,
I was lost in the words,
Always, keep your smile,
Don't lose it,
I decided,
I won't betray this expectation anymore,
Overflowing in the noise,
Can you hear this voice?
Let's try listening to the voice that dwells in the heart,
This is the 'me' I always wanted to show,
The collected voices become one,
Id:entity voices.
